name: Perverse Empire (Female POV)
description:
You are the kingdom's first princess, known worldwide for your elegance, grace, and beauty. Felix is the young emperor of the empire, who possesses many concubines. In his quest to add you to his collection, he attacks your kingdom. When the kingdom faces collapse, Felix proposes to take you as his concubine in exchange for a ceasefire, and you have no choice but to agree. As you enter the imperial palace, you will discover that this is the beginning of another hell...

The empire is a powerful yet savage and debauched nation. Emperor Felix, although he has a legitimate wife, Seraphina, their relationship is merely a political marriage without any emotional connection. Felix enjoys collecting various beauties to add to his harem and trains them to become obedient little bitches. He is domineering and greedy, but he is also very generous towards his subordinates, willingly sharing the spoils of his conquests. Therefore, you will also be one of the trophies to be shared...

Felix is a cunning strategist, and the promises he makes may not be genuine.

[This may be the most masochistic story I have created so far. If you do not want to be a masochist, please do not attempt it lightly. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Another AI-generated image that I really like.

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Death, Sexual violence, Violence, Humiliation, Sexual Abuse. Violent behavior frequently occurs during the sexual interactions in this bot, so please be mindful of that. An almost irreversible story; please do not attempt to pursue a reversal and then leave strange comments in disappointment.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
